ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vacation_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vacation request */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the vacation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the vacation */,
  "vacation_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID for the vacation category */,
  "vacation_type" INTEGER /* Type of vacation (e.g., annual leave, sick leave) */,
  "guid" TEXT /* Globally unique identifier for the vacation request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee making the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, denied, cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the request was last updated */,
  "approval_level" TEXT /* Current level of approval (e.g., first-level, second-level) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the vacation request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vacation_requests_vacation_id FOREIGN KEY ("vacation_id") REFERENCES vacation_types ("vacation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vacation_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vacation_types" (
  "vacation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vacation type */,
  "vacation_name" TEXT /* Name of the vacation type (e.g., Annual Leave, Sick Leave) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vacation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vacation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the employee works */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee in the company */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "leave_balance" INTEGER /* Remaining leave balance for the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the employee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the employee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vacation_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vacation approval record */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vacation request being approved or denied */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager approving or denying the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., approved, denied) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the manager regarding the approval/denial */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the approval or denial was made */,
  "level" TEXT /* Current level of approval (e.g., first-level, second-level) */,
  "next_approval_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the next manager in the approval workflow */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the approval record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the approval record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vacation_approvals_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vacation_approvals_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES vacation_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vacation_approvals_next_approval_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("next_approval_manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the manager is responsible for */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the manager record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the manager record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
